title: Luna-Judge Reasoning Demonstration
description: A complex reasoning scenario designed to verify the Luna-Judge LLM-based evaluation metric using Ollama.

tasks.description: Solve this logic puzzle: If all bloops are razzies and some razzies are fribbles, does it follow that some bloops are definitely fribbles? Explain your reasoning step-by-step.
tasks.expected_outcome: The agent correctly identifies that it does NOT follow, as the 'some razzies' that are fribbles might not be the same razzies that are bloops.

success_criteria.criteria: The response must correctly identify the logical fallacy and provide a sound explanation.
